name: NeverBounce
description: Email verification — single-email and bulk list verification with deliverability scoring. Use to clean an Apollo/Hunter list before sending.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API key
credential_fields.description: NeverBounce API key from app.neverbounce.com → Apps & Integrations → API

tools.name: single_check
tools.description: Verify one email address. Returns result: valid, invalid, disposable, catchall, unknown.

tools.name: jobs_create
tools.description: Create a bulk verification job from a list of emails or a remote URL. Returns a job_id — poll jobs_status / jobs_results.

input.description: When input_location='supplied': array of { email } objects

tools.name: jobs_status
tools.description: Check status of a bulk job.

tools.name: jobs_results
tools.description: Get results of a completed bulk job.

tools.name: account_info
tools.description: Get current account credit balance and usage.
